creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text: oh, and want to point out, configure will show in the log they are trying to download these files, but its not. if it finds the copy it will use it but it uses the same function to do all the checks or download basically. The CMakedDownloadLog.txt in the build directory will show the downloading status with a progress hash if it actually downloads things. That is why I attached the clean log. The same log is produced when my machine is unplugged physically from the internet.
